name: claude-session-history-browsing
title: Claude Workspace Conversations
description: Start a new Claude conversation or list SDK sessions by authorized workspace, browse SDK-owned history, and work through a transparently managed Query.
creator: xue
notes: History uses latest-first 50-message pages with beforeUuid and never blocks Query use on failure. Deferred to later tasks: Slash Commands, Skills, Agents, MCP status, context/background-task status, account data, and ultracode/workflow controls.
